text.title: Kubernetes Resource Requests and Limits Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: set requests greater than 0 from observed p95
raise CPU limit to at least 2x request or omit it

text.example: preconditions == false -> requests_zero == true -> qos_guaranteed_memory_mismatch == true -> conclusion ref.
